title: Udon Prison Breaks Under Luffy’s Will
description: On pages 14–14, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Kawamatsu, Hyogoro, Luffy, Kiku as Luffy turns Udon prison into the rebellion’s first major victory while Big Mom and Queen throw the prison into chaos.
scene: Luffy turns Udon prison into the rebellion’s first major victory while Big Mom and Queen throw the prison into chaos.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: We must first win their trust.

dialogue.speaker: Kawamatsu
dialogue.text: Kappa.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: After all, we've been naught but ghosts for twenty years!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Samurai and the strongest Sumo Wrestler, Yokozuna Kawamatsu!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And I guess that old man really is

dialogue.speaker: Hyogoro
dialogue.text: HYogoro of the flowers!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Then who in the world is Luffy- Taro!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Ahemnoxhooes September

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's like all of Orochi's paranoid prattle's come true!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: % What about me?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We must report this to Lord Kaido: Somehow!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Fear- Some, but reliable!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That mask... I thought he died at open castle!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The foremost beautiful swordsman of Wano Country! Kikunojo of the lingering snows!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Huh?! you're a man?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Yes. But a woman at heart()

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: That mask is scary!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And that's fuckurokuju's rival! The Ninja Raiza of the mist!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: No. All that have seen us

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Must be silenced.

summary: This section advances the Wano - Udon Liberation storyline with 20 dialogue beats. Luffy turns Udon prison into the rebellion’s first major victory while Big Mom and Queen throw the prison into chaos.
